text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In magnificent fashion, Daiwa Scarlet has shown
the world that she's the number one Umamusume
in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, as the crucial first three years of her career
come to a close, the next step in her journey
begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in my room, reflecting on everything that's
happened, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, well. Look who's lazing around.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course. Are you really that surprised?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What are you staring off into space for? Don't get
all sentimental on me now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. And you call yourself my trainer...
Come on, we're leaving!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Where do you think? To somewhere worthy of the
number one Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or so she says, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way! Sold out again?! Ugh! This is all because you took so long getting ready, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And they just got the new seasonal handbags in
too...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. What else?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All this time, I've been putting off a load of
important stuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But today, the sky's the limit! Because I've finally
earned myself a break!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but of course! Come on, let's keep hitting
the stores!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wind up being dragged along on Daiwa Scarlet's
shopping spree.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, that belt doesn't look good on you either...
Hey, go try something else on.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if you have time to complain, you've got
time to change!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now stop wasting my precious time and get
going!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I swear this was three times more exhausting than usual.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But, thanks to all that, you're looking three times
more stylish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Thanks to her efforts, my whole outfit
is on point.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Someone had to do it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now, what's next...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah! An airplane.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Daiwa Scarlet's gaze to see a small red
speck glittering in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I hope she's putting her best foot forward over
there.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Of course. Who else?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My number one rival. The coolest of them all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe she's going overseas...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer... What if... and this is just a what-if,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But what if I said I wanted to go overseas? Would you come with me?
choice_data_list:
I'd make you the number one Umamusume in
the world.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I didn't even get to that part yet, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I mean, it figures you'd say that. Of course
you'd come with me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Well, that's about the long and short of it. Now
you see what my trainer's like.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: How's that for a scoop, Ms. Otonashi?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Yes! I can feel the fiery bond between you in
the depths of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer would go through hell or high water
if it meant helping you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Don't worry, it's just an interview for my
"Number One Umamusume" special feature.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I arranged to meet Ms. Otonashi at this cafe, and
her timing just now couldn't have been more
perfect.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's been begging me to set up an exclusive
interview.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I've been so busy with all my races, and I
never had a chance to pick you a proper outfit for
the photos.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I've really been putting it off.
choice_data_list:
So when you said you'd been putting off
important stuff...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yep! I meant this interview!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Now's your chance to gush about how
wonderful it is to be my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, go on! Impress me! ♪
choice_data_list: How about, "Scarlet is my pride and joy!"
How about, "Scarlet is my pride and joy!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You really are an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's the point in stating the obvious?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've been your number one Umamusume since the
very first day we met, haven't I?
